name: BBQ Lamb Salad W/Grilled Vegetables & Goat Cheese (Gc)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup New Mexican Style BBQ Sauce
salt and freshly ground black pepper
1 red bell pepper, grilled and seeded, cut into 4 pieces
1 yellow bell pepper, grilled and seeded, cut into 4 pieces
2 new potatoes, cooked, grilled, and cut into 1/4-inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a wood or charcoal fire and let it burn down to embers.
2. Brush the lamb with the barbecue sauce and season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Grill for 3 minutes on each side or until done.
4. Serve on top of mixed greens with grilled vegetables and goat cheese.
Yield: 4 servings
